rationale.R1.5: The output does not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it provides scores for R1.2, R1.6, and RX.2 which are outside the active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression: it introduces new errors by not naming the systems and providing full citations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
